adventuringGear.name: Acid (vial)
adventuringGear.desc: As a Magic action, splash on creature within 5 ft or throw up to 20 ft. Target takes 2d6 Acid damage.

adventuringGear.name: Alchemist's Fire
adventuringGear.desc: As a Magic action, throw up to 20 ft. Target takes 1d4 Fire damage at start of each turn. DEX save (DC 10) to extinguish.

adventuringGear.name: Antitoxin
adventuringGear.desc: Advantage on saves vs. poison for 1 hour.

adventuringGear.name: Ball Bearings (bag of 1,000)
adventuringGear.desc: Cover 10-ft square. DEX save (DC 10) or fall Prone.

adventuringGear.name: Bandage
adventuringGear.desc: Stabilize a creature at 0 HP without a Medicine check.

adventuringGear.name: Burglar's Pack
adventuringGear.contents: Backpack, Ball Bearings, Bell, Candles (10), Crowbar, Hooded Lantern, Oil (2), Rations (5 days), Rope (50 ft), Tinderbox, Waterskin

adventuringGear.name: Caltrops (bag of 20)
adventuringGear.desc: Cover 5-ft square. Creature entering makes DEX save (DC 15) or takes 1 pierce and speed reduced to 0.

adventuringGear.name: Candle
adventuringGear.desc: Bright light 5 ft, dim light 5 ft more. Burns for 1 hour.

adventuringGear.name: Climber's Kit
adventuringGear.desc: Advantage on Athletics checks to climb.

adventuringGear.name: Crowbar
adventuringGear.desc: Advantage on STR checks where leverage applies.

adventuringGear.name: Diplomat's Pack
adventuringGear.contents: Chest, Case (map/scroll), Fine Clothes, Ink, Ink Pen, Lamp, Oil (2), Paper (5), Perfume, Sealing Wax, Soap

adventuringGear.name: Dungeoneer's Pack
adventuringGear.contents: Backpack, Crowbar, Hammer, Pitons (10), Rations (10 days), Rope (50 ft), Tinderbox, Torches (10), Waterskin

adventuringGear.name: Entertainer's Pack
adventuringGear.contents: Backpack, Bedroll, Costumes (2), Candles (5), Rations (5 days), Waterskin, Disguise Kit

adventuringGear.name: Explorer's Pack
adventuringGear.contents: Backpack, Bedroll, Mess Kit, Rations (10 days), Rope (50 ft), Tinderbox, Torches (10), Waterskin

adventuringGear.name: Healer's Kit
adventuringGear.desc: 10 uses. Stabilize a creature at 0 HP.

adventuringGear.name: Holy Water
adventuringGear.desc: As a Magic action, splash on creature within 5 ft or throw up to 20 ft. Fiend or Undead takes 2d8 Radiant damage.

adventuringGear.name: Hooded Lantern
adventuringGear.desc: Bright light 30 ft, dim 30 ft more. Burns 6 hrs on 1 pint of oil.

adventuringGear.name: Hunting Trap
adventuringGear.desc: Creature stepping on trap makes DC 13 DEX save or takes 1d4 pierce and is restrained.

adventuringGear.name: Lamp
adventuringGear.desc: Bright light 15 ft, dim 30 ft more. Burns 6 hrs on 1 pint of oil.

adventuringGear.name: Lock
adventuringGear.desc: DC 15 DEX check with Thieves' Tools to pick.

adventuringGear.name: Manacles
adventuringGear.desc: DC 20 DEX check to escape, DC 25 STR to break.

adventuringGear.name: Net
adventuringGear.desc: Thrown (5/15). Large or smaller creature is Restrained. DC 10 STR check or 5 slashing damage to escape.

adventuringGear.name: Oil (flask)
adventuringGear.desc: Splash on creature within 5 ft or throw 20 ft. If ignited, target takes 5 Fire damage for 2 rounds.

adventuringGear.name: Poison, Basic (vial)
adventuringGear.desc: Apply to weapon or ammo (1 min). Next hit deals extra 1d4 Poison damage. Dries after 1 min.

adventuringGear.name: Priest's Pack
adventuringGear.contents: Backpack, Blanket, Candles (10), Holy Symbol, Rations (2 days), Tinderbox, Waterskin

adventuringGear.name: Ram, Portable
adventuringGear.desc: +4 bonus to STR checks to break open doors.

adventuringGear.name: Rope, Hempen (50 ft)
adventuringGear.desc: 2 HP, burst DC 17.

adventuringGear.name: Rope, Silk (50 ft)
adventuringGear.desc: 2 HP, burst DC 17. Advantage on checks to tie knots.

adventuringGear.name: Scholar's Pack
adventuringGear.contents: Backpack, Book, Ink, Ink Pen, Lamp, Oil (10), Paper (10), Parchment (10), Tinderbox

adventuringGear.name: Torch
adventuringGear.desc: Bright light 20 ft, dim 20 ft more. Burns for 1 hour. 1 Fire damage on hit.

potions.name: Potion of Climbing
potions.desc: Gain climbing speed equal to walking speed for 1 hour. Advantage on Athletics checks to climb.

potions.name: Potion of Fire Resistance
potions.desc: Resistance to Fire damage for 1 hour.

potions.name: Potion of Invisibility
potions.desc: Invisible for 1 hour. Ends early if you attack or cast a spell.

potions.name: Potion of Resistance
potions.desc: Resistance to one damage type for 1 hour.

potions.name: Antitoxin
potions.desc: Advantage on saves vs. poison for 1 hour.

mounts.name: Donkey
mounts.desc: Sturdy beast of burden. Not fast, but dependable on Ansalon's rough roads.

mounts.name: Draft Horse
mounts.desc: A broad-shouldered workhorse bred for pulling wagons and ploughs. Common in Vogler's farmlands.

mounts.name: Riding Horse
mounts.desc: A swift and agile horse trained for riders. The standard mount of Solamnic scouts and couriers.

mounts.name: Warhorse
mounts.desc: A powerful destrier trained for battle. Will not bolt from combat. Solamnic knights prize these mounts above all others.

mounts.name: Pony
mounts.desc: A small, hardy mount favoured by kender and gnomes. Sure-footed in hill country.

mounts.name: Saddle, Military
mounts.desc: Gives Advantage on checks to stay mounted. Standard issue for Solamnic cavalry.

mounts.name: Saddlebags
mounts.desc: Carry up to 30 lbs of gear on your mount.

mounts.name: Barding, Chain
mounts.desc: Chain barding. Mount AC becomes 13. Reduces mount speed by 10 ft.

mounts.name: Barding, Leather
mounts.desc: Leather barding. Mount AC becomes 11. No speed penalty.

mounts.name: Barding, Plate
mounts.desc: Full plate barding. Mount AC becomes 18. Reduces mount speed by 10 ft. Extremely rare on Ansalon.

sotdq.desc: Items specific to the Dragonlance: Shadow of the Dragon Queen campaign setting.

weapons.name: Hoopak
weapons.desc: Kender weapon. Can also be used as a sling (1d4 bludg, Ammo 30/120). Produces a shrill whistle when whirled.

weapons.name: Pig Skewer
weapons.desc: A crude spear fashioned from boar tusks. Crafted by the Vogler merchant from trophy tusks.

armor.name: Dragon Army Shield
armor.desc: A shield bearing the five-headed dragon emblem of the Dragon Armies. Grants +2 AC. Carrying one may provoke suspicion or hostility from Solamnic forces.

armor.name: Solamnic Plate
armor.desc: Ceremonial plate armor of the Knights of Solamnia, bearing the order's crest. Equivalent to Plate Armor. Rarely available for purchase — earned through service.

magicItems.name: Fargab
magicItems.desc: A small, curious talking automaton. Speaks Common and Gnomish. Has a sarcastic personality and knowledge of Mount Nevermind. Cannot take actions in combat.

magicItems.name: Flying Citadel Shard
magicItems.desc: A fragment of a flying citadel's control crystal. While attuned, you can use an action to cast Fly on yourself (1/day). The shard glows faintly when Dragon Army forces are within 1 mile.

magicItems.name: Mirror of Reflected Pasts
magicItems.desc: An ancient Istarian mirror. Once per day, gaze into it to cast Legend Lore without material components. The mirror shows visions of the past rather than text.

magicItems.name: Dragon Queen's Wand
magicItems.desc: A wand fashioned from obsidian with a five-headed dragon. +1 to spell attack rolls and spell save DC. Can cast Fear (1/day) and Dragon's Breath (1/day).

magicItems.name: Dawnstrike
magicItems.desc: A longsword that glows faintly with golden light. +1 to attack and damage rolls. Sheds bright light 10 ft, dim 10 ft more. Against Undead and Fiends, deals an extra 1d6 Radiant damage.

magicItems.name: Dragonlance
magicItems.desc: A weapon of legend, forged in the Age of Dreams to fight the Dark Queen's dragons. Functions as a +3 lance. Deals an extra 3d6 Radiant damage to Dragons. While mounted, you and your mount have resistance to Dragon breath weapons.

magicItems.name: Kagonesti Forest Shroud
magicItems.desc: A cloak woven from leaves that never wilt. While wearing it in natural terrain, you have Advantage on Stealth checks and can cast Pass Without Trace once per Long Rest.

magicItems.name: Knight's Crown (Crown of the Rose)
magicItems.desc: A circlet bestowed upon knights of exceptional honour. +1 to WIS saves. Once per Long Rest, cast Beacon of Hope without a spell slot.

magicItems.name: Istarian Codex
magicItems.desc: A pre-Cataclysm text from the great library of Istar. Studying it for 8 hours grants proficiency in History for 7 days. Contains fragmentary lore about the gods.

magicItems.name: Kapak Venom
magicItems.desc: Harvested from a Kapak draconian's fangs. Apply to a weapon (1 minute). The next hit deals extra 2d6 Poison damage. The venom dries after 10 minutes.

tradeGoods.name: Steel Piece (stl)
tradeGoods.desc: The primary currency of Ansalon after the Cataclysm. Steel is more valuable than gold because it can be forged into weapons and armor.

tradeGoods.name: Istarian Relic
tradeGoods.desc: A pre-Cataclysm artifact. Even mundane items from Istar fetch high prices from collectors.
tradeGoods.value: 5-500 stl depending on age and condition

tradeGoods.name: Dragon Army Insignia
tradeGoods.desc: A metal badge of rank from the Dragon Armies. Each color (red, blue, green, black, white) denotes a different Highlord's forces.
tradeGoods.value: 1-5 stl, but dangerous to carry openly

tradeGoods.name: Solamnic Tabard
tradeGoods.desc: A cloth tabard bearing the symbol of one of the three Solamnic orders (Crown, Sword, or Rose). Identifies the wearer as a knight or squire.
tradeGoods.value: Priceless to a knight, 2 stl to a merchant

tradeGoods.name: Dried Yarrow
tradeGoods.desc: A medicinal herb used in poultices and teas. Common in the fields around Vogler.

tradeGoods.name: Dreamlily
tradeGoods.desc: A rare flower from the Kharolis Mountains. Used in healing salves and by herbalists. Slightly intoxicating when smoked.

tradeGoods.name: Boar Tusks
tradeGoods.desc: Trophy tusks from wild boars. Can be sold or crafted into a Pig Skewer by a skilled merchant.

magicWeapons.name: +1 Weapon
magicWeapons.desc: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

magicWeapons.name: +2 Weapon
magicWeapons.desc: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

magicWeapons.name: +3 Weapon
magicWeapons.desc: You have a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this magic weapon.

magicWeapons.name: Berserker Axe
magicWeapons.desc: A cruel-looking axe engraved with barbarian runes. +1 to attack and damage rolls. Your HP max increases by 1 per level. Curse: when you take damage, DC 15 WIS save or go berserk — you must attack the nearest creature on each turn until no creatures are within 60 ft.

magicWeapons.name: Dancing Sword
magicWeapons.desc: As a Bonus Action, toss this sword into the air to animate it. It hovers within 30 ft and attacks on your turn using your attack bonus. It can move up to 30 ft and attack one creature within 5 ft each turn. After 4 rounds, it falls. Keeps its +0/+1/+2/+3 bonus while dancing.

magicWeapons.name: Defender
magicWeapons.desc: A fine weapon with a faint silvery glow. +3 to attack and damage rolls. At the start of each turn, you may transfer some or all of the +3 bonus to AC instead, lasting until the start of your next turn.

magicWeapons.name: Dragon Slayer
magicWeapons.desc: You gain a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls. When you hit a Dragon, it takes an extra 3d6 damage of the weapon's type.

magicWeapons.name: Dragonslayer Greatsword
magicWeapons.desc: A massive two-handed blade forged in the Solamnic tradition, inscribed with the names of dragons slain by the Knights of old. +1 to attack and damage rolls. When you hit a Dragon, it deals an extra 3d6 damage.

magicWeapons.name: Flame Tongue
magicWeapons.desc: As a Bonus Action, speak the command word to ignite the blade. While ablaze, it deals an extra 2d6 Fire damage on a hit and sheds bright light 40 ft, dim light 40 ft more. Speak the command word again or sheathe it to douse the flames.

magicWeapons.name: Frost Brand
magicWeapons.desc: When you hit with this weapon, it deals an extra 1d6 Cold damage. While drawn, you have resistance to Fire damage. In freezing temperatures, it sheds bright light 10 ft, dim 10 ft more.

magicWeapons.name: Giant Slayer
magicWeapons.desc: +1 to attack and damage rolls. When you hit a Giant, it takes an extra 2d6 damage and must make a DC 15 STR save or fall Prone.

magicWeapons.name: Holy Avenger
magicWeapons.desc: Forged for champions of righteousness. +3 to attack and damage rolls. Deals an extra 2d10 Radiant damage to Fiends and Undead. While you hold the drawn sword, you and allies within 10 ft have Advantage on saves against spells.

magicWeapons.name: Javelin of Lightning
magicWeapons.desc: Speak the command word and hurl it — it transforms into a bolt of lightning, forming a 5-ft-wide line between you and a target within 120 ft. Each creature in the line makes a DC 13 DEX save, taking 4d6 Lightning damage on a failure, half on success. Reverts to javelin after. Property can't be used again until next dawn.

magicWeapons.name: Luck Blade
magicWeapons.desc: A shimmering sword. +1 to attack and damage rolls. +1 to all saving throws while on your person. The sword has 1d4-1 Wish charges (determined when found). You can use an action to expend 1 charge to cast Wish.

magicWeapons.name: Mace of Disruption
magicWeapons.desc: Sheds bright light 20 ft, dim 20 ft. When you hit a Fiend or Undead, it takes an extra 2d6 Radiant damage. If the target has 25 HP or fewer after taking this damage, it must make a DC 15 WIS save or be destroyed.

magicWeapons.name: Mace of Smiting
magicWeapons.desc: +1 to attack and damage rolls (+3 vs Constructs). On a critical hit, deal an extra 2d6 Force damage (4d6 vs Constructs). If a Construct has 25 HP or fewer after this damage, it is destroyed.

magicWeapons.name: Mace of Terror
magicWeapons.desc: 3 charges (regains 1d3 at dawn). Expend 1 charge as an action: each creature of your choice within 30 ft makes DC 15 WIS save or becomes Frightened for 1 minute. A creature can repeat the save at the end of each turn.

magicWeapons.name: Nine Lives Stealer
magicWeapons.desc: A sinister black blade. +2 to attack and damage rolls. Has 1d8+1 charges. On a critical hit against a creature with fewer than 100 HP, it must make DC 15 CON save or be slain instantly (expends 1 charge). No effect on Constructs or Undead.

magicWeapons.name: Oathbow
magicWeapons.desc: Whisper 'Swift death to you who have wronged me' while nocking an arrow to designate a Sworn Enemy. +3d6 Piercing on hits against the enemy. Advantage on attacks against it. Attacks against other creatures have Disadvantage while the enemy lives. Lasts 7 days or until the enemy dies. Can't use again until next dawn after enemy dies.

magicWeapons.name: Rapier of Wounding
magicWeapons.desc: HP lost to this weapon can only be regained by a Short or Long Rest. Once per turn on a hit, you can wound the target — it takes 1d4 Necrotic damage at the start of each of its turns per wound. DC 15 CON save at end of turn ends all wounds. Also ends with any magical healing.

magicWeapons.name: Scimitar of Speed
magicWeapons.desc: +2 to attack and damage rolls. You can make one attack with it as a Bonus Action on each of your turns.

magicWeapons.name: Staff of Striking
magicWeapons.desc: +3 to attack and damage rolls. 10 charges (regains 1d6+4 at dawn). On a hit, you may expend up to 3 charges — each charge deals an extra 1d6 Force damage.

magicWeapons.name: Staff of the Magi
magicWeapons.desc: An ornate staff carved with arcane sigils. +2 to spell attack rolls. 50 charges. Can cast numerous spells (Fireball, Lightning Bolt, Ice Storm, etc.) by expending charges. Absorb spells targeted at you as a Reaction, regaining charges equal to spell level. If reduced to 0 charges, 50% chance of massive explosion.

magicWeapons.name: Sun Blade
magicWeapons.desc: A longsword hilt that projects a blade of pure radiance. +2 to attack and damage rolls. Deals Radiant damage instead of Slashing. Deals an extra 1d8 Radiant to Undead. Emits bright light 15 ft, dim 15 ft (expandable to 30/30). Has the Finesse property.

magicWeapons.name: Sword of Sharpness
magicWeapons.desc: Deals an extra 14 (4d6) Slashing damage on a critical hit (instead of the normal crit bonus). On a natural 20 against a creature with at least one limb, you sever one of its limbs (DM's choice). +1 to attack and damage rolls.

magicWeapons.name: Trident of Fish Command
magicWeapons.desc: 3 charges (regains 1d3 at dawn). While carrying it, you can use an action and expend 1 charge to cast Dominate Beast (save DC 15) on a beast that has an innate swimming speed.

magicWeapons.name: Vicious Weapon
magicWeapons.desc: When you roll a 20 on an attack roll with this weapon, the target takes an extra 2d6 damage of the weapon's type.

magicWeapons.name: Vorpal Sword
magicWeapons.desc: +3 to attack and damage rolls. Ignores resistance to Slashing damage. On a natural 20 against a creature with at least one head, you cut off one of its heads. If the creature can't survive without the lost head, it dies. Creatures immune to Slashing or lacking heads are unaffected.

magicWeapons.name: Weapon of Warning
magicWeapons.desc: While this weapon is on your person, you have Advantage on Initiative rolls. You and allies within 30 ft can't be Surprised, provided you aren't Incapacitated.

magicWeapons.name: Dagger of Venom
magicWeapons.desc: +1 to attack and damage rolls. Once per day as an action, coat the blade with thick, black poison for 1 minute. The next hit deals an extra 2d10 Poison damage, and the target must make DC 15 CON save or become Poisoned for 1 minute.

magicWeapons.name: Hammer of Thunderbolts
magicWeapons.desc: A massive war hammer inscribed with storm runes. +1 to attack and damage rolls. While wearing a Belt of Giant Strength and Gauntlets of Ogre Power, the bonus increases to +3, your STR becomes 30, and on a hit you can stun a Giant (DC 17 CON save or Stunned until end of your next turn). You can throw it 60/180 ft, and it flies back. Deals an extra 1d8 Thunder damage on every hit.

magicWeapons.name: Sword of Life Stealing
magicWeapons.desc: On a critical hit against a creature that isn't a Construct or Undead, the target takes an extra 3d6 Necrotic damage, and you gain temporary HP equal to the extra damage dealt.

magicWeapons.name: Sword of Answering
magicWeapons.desc: A magnificent longsword bound to an alignment. +3 to attack and damage rolls. When a creature within your reach damages you, you can use your Reaction to make a melee attack against that creature with Advantage.

magicWeapons.name: Moonblade
magicWeapons.desc: An ancient elven longsword that bonds to worthy elf-blooded wielders. Has 1d6-1 runes, each granting a property: +1 to attack/damage, extra 1d6 damage type, Finesse, light in 20 ft, Thrown 20/60, or defender (transfer bonus to AC). Sentient and may refuse an unworthy wielder.

magicWeapons.name: Staff of Power
magicWeapons.desc: +2 to attack and damage rolls, +2 to AC, saves, and spell attack rolls while held. 20 charges (regains 2d8+4 at dawn). Cast spells by expending charges: Cone of Cold (5), Fireball 5th (5), Globe of Invulnerability (6), Hold Monster (5), Levitate (2), Lightning Bolt 5th (5), Magic Missile (1), Ray of Enfeeblement (1), Wall of Force (5). Retributive strike option if broken.

magicWeapons.name: +1 Ammunition
magicWeapons.desc: You have a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, it is no longer magical.

magicWeapons.name: +2 Ammunition
magicWeapons.desc: You have a +2 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, it is no longer magical.

magicWeapons.name: +3 Ammunition
magicWeapons.desc: You have a +3 bonus to attack and damage rolls made with this piece of magic ammunition. Once it hits a target, it is no longer magical.

magicWeapons.name: Arrow of Slaying
magicWeapons.desc: An arrow designed to slay a particular type of creature. If the target is the specified creature type and you hit it, it takes an extra 6d10 Piercing damage. DC 17 CON save for half. Once used, it becomes a nonmagical arrow.

magicWeapons.name: Walloping Ammunition
magicWeapons.desc: A creature hit by this ammunition must succeed on a DC 10 STR save or be knocked Prone.

magicWeapons.name: Unbreakable Arrow
magicWeapons.desc: This arrow can't be broken, except when in an Antimagic Field.

magicArmor.name: +1 Armor
magicArmor.desc: You have a +1 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.

magicArmor.name: +2 Armor
magicArmor.desc: You have a +2 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.

magicArmor.name: +3 Armor
magicArmor.desc: You have a +3 bonus to AC while wearing this armor.

magicArmor.name: +1 Shield
magicArmor.desc: While holding this shield, you have a +1 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal bonus.

magicArmor.name: +2 Shield
magicArmor.desc: While holding this shield, you have a +2 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal bonus.

magicArmor.name: +3 Shield
magicArmor.desc: While holding this shield, you have a +3 bonus to AC in addition to the shield's normal bonus.

magicArmor.name: Adamantine Armor
magicArmor.desc: This suit of armor is reinforced with adamantine, one of the hardest substances in existence. While wearing it, any critical hit against you becomes a normal hit.

magicArmor.name: Animated Shield
magicArmor.desc: As a Bonus Action, speak the command word to animate this shield. It leaps into the air and hovers within 5 ft, protecting you as if you were wielding it, leaving both hands free. It remains animated for 1 minute or until you use a Bonus Action to end it.

magicArmor.name: Armor of Gleaming
magicArmor.desc: This armor never gets dirty. Mud, blood, and grime slide off its surface.

magicArmor.name: Armor of Invulnerability
magicArmor.desc: You have resistance to nonmagical damage while wearing this armor. Once per day as an action, you can make yourself immune to nonmagical damage for 10 minutes.

magicArmor.name: Armor of Resistance
magicArmor.desc: While wearing this armor, you have resistance to one type of damage. The DM chooses or randomly determines the type: Acid, Cold, Fire, Force, Lightning, Necrotic, Poison, Psychic, Radiant, or Thunder.

magicArmor.name: Armor of Vulnerability
magicArmor.desc: While wearing this armor, you have resistance to one of Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing (non-magical). Curse: you have vulnerability to two of those three damage types.

magicArmor.name: Cast-Off Armor
magicArmor.desc: You can doff this armor as an action instead of the usual time.

magicArmor.name: Demon Armor
magicArmor.desc: Plate armor formed from black iron with a fiendish visage. AC 18 +1 (effectively 19). You are proficient with this armor even if you lack proficiency with heavy armor. +1 to attack and damage rolls with unarmed strikes (which deal 1d8 Slashing). Curse: once attuned, you can't doff it unless targeted by Remove Curse. You have Disadvantage on attacks against Demons and on saves against their abilities.

magicArmor.name: Dragon Scale Mail
magicArmor.desc: Scale mail made from the scales of a specific dragon type. AC 14 + DEX (max 2) + 1. Advantage on saving throws against the breath weapons of dragons of the armor's type. Resistance to the damage type associated with the dragon: Black/Copper (Acid), Blue/Bronze (Lightning), Brass/Gold/Red (Fire), Green (Poison), Silver/White (Cold). Once per day, sense the direction and distance of the nearest dragon of that type within 30 miles.

magicArmor.name: Dwarven Plate
magicArmor.desc: While wearing this armor, you gain +2 to AC (for 20 total). If an effect moves you against your will along the ground, you can use your Reaction to reduce the distance by up to 10 feet.

magicArmor.name: Efreeti Chain
magicArmor.desc: Chain mail forged in the City of Brass. AC 13 + 3 (effectively 16, no DEX cap). You are immune to Fire damage, can understand and speak Ignan, and can walk on and stand in molten rock.

magicArmor.name: Elven Chain
magicArmor.desc: A shirt of chain mail woven by elves. AC 13 + DEX (max 2) + 1, no Stealth disadvantage. You are considered proficient with this armor even if you lack proficiency with medium armor.

magicArmor.name: Glamoured Studded Leather
magicArmor.desc: Studded leather with AC 12 + DEX + 1. As a Bonus Action, speak its command word to change the armor's appearance to a normal set of clothing or another type of armor. It retains all its properties in either form. The illusory appearance can be detected with a DC 20 Investigation check.

magicArmor.name: Mariner's Armor
magicArmor.desc: While wearing this armor, you have a swimming speed equal to your walking speed. If you start your turn underwater with 0 HP, the armor causes you to rise 60 ft toward the surface.

magicArmor.name: Mithral Armor
magicArmor.desc: Mithral is a light, flexible metal. A mithral chain shirt or breastplate can be worn under normal clothes. If the armor normally imposes Disadvantage on Stealth checks or has a STR requirement, the mithral version doesn't.

magicArmor.name: Plate Armor of Etherealness
magicArmor.desc: While wearing this armor, you can speak its command word as an action to gain the effect of the Etherealness spell, lasting up to 10 minutes or until you end it (no action required). This property can't be used again until the next dawn.

magicArmor.name: Shield of Missile Attraction
magicArmor.desc: While holding this shield, you have resistance to damage from ranged weapon attacks. Curse: ranged weapon attacks that target other creatures within 10 ft of you are magically redirected to target you instead.

magicArmor.name: Sentinel Shield
magicArmor.desc: A shield emblazoned with a watchful eye. While holding it, you have Advantage on Initiative rolls and Perception checks.

magicArmor.name: Shield of the Hidden Lord
magicArmor.desc: A shield containing the essence of a fiend. +2 AC (shield). Grants resistance to Fire damage. Once per day, use an action to cast Fireball (5th level, save DC 18). The fiend trapped within occasionally speaks, offering sinister counsel.

magicArmor.name: Spellguard Shield
magicArmor.desc: While holding this shield, you have Advantage on saving throws against spells and other magical effects. Spell attacks have Disadvantage against you.

magicArmor.name: Arrow-Catching Shield
magicArmor.desc: +2 AC against ranged attacks (in addition to the shield's normal AC bonus). When a ranged attack misses you while you wield this shield, you can use your Reaction to cause it to target another creature you can see within 5 ft of you, using the same attack roll against the new target.

magicArmor.name: Smoldering Armor
magicArmor.desc: Wisps of harmless, odorless smoke rise from this armor while it is worn. A cosmetic magical item popular among those who enjoy dramatic entrances.

magicArmor.name: Armor of the Moonguard
magicArmor.desc: Silvery armor blessed by Solinari. +1 to AC. At night, under moonlight, you can cast Shield of Faith on yourself once without expending a spell slot. Recharges at dawn.

magicArmor.name: Black Dragon Scale Mail
magicArmor.desc: Forged from the scales of Ansalon's black dragons. AC 14 + DEX (max 2) + 1. Resistance to Acid damage. Advantage on saves vs dragon breath weapons. Once per day, sense the nearest black dragon within 30 miles.

magicArmor.name: Red Dragon Scale Mail
magicArmor.desc: Forged from the scales of Ansalon's red dragons. AC 14 + DEX (max 2) + 1. Resistance to Fire damage. Advantage on saves vs dragon breath weapons. Once per day, sense the nearest red dragon within 30 miles.

magicArmor.name: White Dragon Scale Mail
magicArmor.desc: Forged from the scales of Ansalon's white dragons. AC 14 + DEX (max 2) + 1. Resistance to Cold damage. Advantage on saves vs dragon breath weapons. Once per day, sense the nearest white dragon within 30 miles.

magicArmor.name: Blue Dragon Scale Mail
magicArmor.desc: Forged from the scales of Ansalon's blue dragons. AC 14 + DEX (max 2) + 1. Resistance to Lightning damage. Advantage on saves vs dragon breath weapons. Once per day, sense the nearest blue dragon within 30 miles.

magicArmor.name: Green Dragon Scale Mail
magicArmor.desc: Forged from the scales of Ansalon's green dragons. AC 14 + DEX (max 2) + 1. Resistance to Poison damage. Advantage on saves vs dragon breath weapons. Once per day, sense the nearest green dragon within 30 miles.

artisanTools.name: Alchemist's Supplies
artisanTools.desc: Create alchemical substances, identify potions and substances. Advantage on checks to brew potions, identify alchemical items, or detect poisoned food/drink.

artisanTools.name: Brewer's Supplies
artisanTools.desc: Brew beverages, identify alcohol quality. Advantage on checks to purify water, identify potables, or detect poison in drinks.

artisanTools.name: Calligrapher's Supplies
artisanTools.desc: Create elegant writing and documents. Advantage on checks to forge signatures, identify handwriting, or create official-looking documents.

artisanTools.name: Carpenter's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Build and repair wooden structures. Advantage on checks to assess wooden structures, find weaknesses in doors/walls, or build temporary fortifications.

artisanTools.name: Cartographer's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Create and interpret maps. Advantage on checks to navigate, find your way when lost, or estimate distances and terrain.

artisanTools.name: Cobbler's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Make and repair footwear. Advantage on checks to create hidden compartments in boots, identify tracks by footwear, or move quietly.

artisanTools.name: Cook's Utensils
artisanTools.desc: Prepare food. Advantage on checks to detect poison in food, prepare rations for travel, or boost morale with a good meal (+1 temp HP on long rest).

artisanTools.name: Glassblower's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Create glass items. Advantage on checks to identify glass quality, spot concealed glass panels, or create vials and containers.

artisanTools.name: Jeweler's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Appraise and create jewelry. Advantage on checks to identify gems, detect fake jewelry, or assess the value of treasure.

artisanTools.name: Leatherworker's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Work with leather. Advantage on checks to repair leather armor, create leather items, or identify leather quality and origin.

artisanTools.name: Mason's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Work with stone. Advantage on checks to find secret doors in stonework, assess structural integrity, or identify worked stone.

artisanTools.name: Painter's Supplies
artisanTools.desc: Create visual art. Advantage on checks to create forgeries, identify paintings, or create convincing illusions via paint.

artisanTools.name: Potter's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Create pottery and ceramics. Advantage on checks to identify clay origins, repair ceramics, or create watertight containers.

artisanTools.name: Smith's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Work with metal. Advantage on checks to repair metal armor/weapons, identify metal quality, or detect flaws in metalwork.

artisanTools.name: Tinker's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Repair and create mechanical devices. Advantage on checks to repair objects, disarm mechanical traps, or create clockwork gadgets.

artisanTools.name: Weaver's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Work with cloth and textiles. Advantage on checks to repair clothing, assess fabric quality, or create rope from cloth.

artisanTools.name: Woodcarver's Tools
artisanTools.desc: Carve and work with wood. Advantage on checks to create wooden items, identify wood types, or repair wooden equipment.

otherTools.name: Disguise Kit
otherTools.desc: Create disguises. Advantage on checks to disguise yourself, see through others' disguises, or create false identities.

otherTools.name: Forgery Kit
otherTools.desc: Create forged documents. Advantage on checks to forge documents, detect forgeries, or replicate seals and signatures.

otherTools.name: Herbalism Kit
otherTools.desc: Identify and use plants. Advantage on checks to identify plants, create antitoxins, or brew Potions of Healing (1/long rest with materials).

otherTools.name: Navigator's Tools
otherTools.desc: Navigate by stars and maps. Advantage on checks to navigate, avoid getting lost, or determine your position.

otherTools.name: Poisoner's Kit
otherTools.desc: Create and identify poisons. Advantage on checks to craft poisons, detect poison, or apply poison to weapons.

otherTools.name: Thieves' Tools
otherTools.desc: Pick locks and disarm traps. Required to attempt lockpicking. Advantage on checks to open locks, disarm traps, or detect trap mechanisms.

gamingSets.name: Dice Set
gamingSets.desc: Play dice games. Advantage on checks to detect cheating, win gambling games, or read opponents.

gamingSets.name: Dragonchess Set
gamingSets.desc: Play dragonchess. Advantage on checks involving strategy, planning, or predicting opponent moves.

gamingSets.name: Playing Card Set
gamingSets.desc: Play card games. Advantage on checks to detect cheating, read tells, or win gambling games.

gamingSets.name: Three-Dragon Ante Set
gamingSets.desc: Play Three-Dragon Ante. Advantage on checks in gambling, reading people, or bluffing.

musicalInstruments.name: Bagpipes
musicalInstruments.desc: Loud wind instrument. Advantage on Performance checks, can be heard from far away.

musicalInstruments.name: Drum
musicalInstruments.desc: Percussion instrument. Advantage on Performance checks and for keeping time/coordination.

musicalInstruments.name: Dulcimer
musicalInstruments.desc: Stringed instrument played with hammers. Advantage on Performance checks in formal settings.

musicalInstruments.name: Flute
musicalInstruments.desc: Wind instrument. Advantage on Performance checks, easy to carry and conceal.

musicalInstruments.name: Lute
musicalInstruments.desc: Popular stringed instrument. Advantage on Performance checks, versatile for many musical styles.

musicalInstruments.name: Lyre
musicalInstruments.desc: Ancient stringed instrument. Advantage on Performance checks, associated with bards and poets.

musicalInstruments.name: Horn
musicalInstruments.desc: Brass instrument. Advantage on Performance checks, can signal over long distances.

musicalInstruments.name: Pan Flute
musicalInstruments.desc: Multiple pipe wind instrument. Advantage on Performance checks, pastoral associations.

musicalInstruments.name: Shawm
musicalInstruments.desc: Double-reed wind instrument. Advantage on Performance checks, loud outdoor performances.

musicalInstruments.name: Viol
musicalInstruments.desc: Bowed stringed instrument. Advantage on Performance checks in formal or courtly settings.

masteryProperties.Cleave: If you hit a creature, you can make an attack roll against a second creature within 5 feet of the first, using the same modifier. On a hit, deal the weapon's damage (no ability modifier) to the second creature.
masteryProperties.Graze: If your attack roll misses, the target still takes damage equal to the ability modifier you used for the attack roll.
masteryProperties.Nick: When you make the extra attack of the Light property, you can make it as part of the Attack action instead of as a Bonus Action. You can still make this extra attack only once per turn.
masteryProperties.Push: If you hit a creature, you can push it up to 10 feet straight away from you if it is Large or smaller.
masteryProperties.Sap: If you hit a creature, that creature has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.
masteryProperties.Slow: If you hit a creature, its speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.
masteryProperties.Topple: If you hit a creature, you can force it to make a Constitution saving throw (DC = 8 + PB + ability modifier). On a failure, the creature has the Prone condition.
masteryProperties.Vex: If you hit a creature, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against that creature before the end of your next turn.

spellLearning.desc: D&D 5e 2024: Wizards can copy spells from scrolls or spellbooks into their own spellbook. Cost is 50 gp per spell level, time is 2 hours per spell level. Scroll is consumed when copying.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Burning Hands
scrolls.desc: 1st-level evocation. 3d6 fire damage in 15-ft cone. DEX save for half.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Charm Person
scrolls.desc: 1st-level enchantment. Target regards you as friendly. WIS save negates.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Detect Magic
scrolls.desc: 1st-level divination (ritual). Sense magic within 30 ft for 10 minutes.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Feather Fall
scrolls.desc: 1st-level transmutation. Slow falling for up to 5 creatures. Reaction.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Mage Armor
scrolls.desc: 1st-level abjuration. AC becomes 13 + DEX mod for 8 hours.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Magic Missile
scrolls.desc: 1st-level evocation. Three darts deal 1d4+1 force damage each. Auto-hit.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Shield
scrolls.desc: 1st-level abjuration. +5 AC until start of next turn. Reaction.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Sleep
scrolls.desc: 1st-level enchantment. 5d8 HP of creatures fall unconscious.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Thunderwave
scrolls.desc: 1st-level evocation. 2d8 thunder damage, push 10 ft. CON save for half.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Identify
scrolls.desc: 1st-level divination (ritual). Learn properties of a magic item.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Find Familiar
scrolls.desc: 1st-level conjuration (ritual). Summon a spirit familiar.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Comprehend Languages
scrolls.desc: 1st-level divination (ritual). Understand any language for 1 hour.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Darkness
scrolls.desc: 2nd-level evocation. Magical darkness fills 15-ft-radius sphere.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Hold Person
scrolls.desc: 2nd-level enchantment. Paralyze a humanoid. WIS save each turn.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Invisibility
scrolls.desc: 2nd-level illusion. Target becomes invisible for 1 hour.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Knock
scrolls.desc: 2nd-level transmutation. Unlock one lock, bar, or seal.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Levitate
scrolls.desc: 2nd-level transmutation. Rise or descend up to 20 ft per turn.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Misty Step
scrolls.desc: 2nd-level conjuration. Teleport 30 ft. Bonus action.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Scorching Ray
scrolls.desc: 2nd-level evocation. Three rays, 2d6 fire each. Ranged spell attack.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Shatter
scrolls.desc: 2nd-level evocation. 3d8 thunder damage in 10-ft sphere.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Web
scrolls.desc: 2nd-level conjuration. 20-ft cube of sticky webs. Restrains creatures.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Mirror Image
scrolls.desc: 2nd-level illusion. Three duplicates make you harder to hit.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Counterspell
scrolls.desc: 3rd-level abjuration. Interrupt a spell being cast. Reaction.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Dispel Magic
scrolls.desc: 3rd-level abjuration. End spells of 3rd level or lower.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Fireball
scrolls.desc: 3rd-level evocation. 8d6 fire damage in 20-ft-radius sphere.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Fly
scrolls.desc: 3rd-level transmutation. Gain 60 ft flying speed for 10 minutes.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Haste
scrolls.desc: 3rd-level transmutation. Double speed, +2 AC, extra action.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Lightning Bolt
scrolls.desc: 3rd-level evocation. 8d6 lightning in 100-ft line.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Slow
scrolls.desc: 3rd-level transmutation. Halve speed, -2 AC, no reactions.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Tongues
scrolls.desc: 3rd-level divination. Understand and speak any language.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Vampiric Touch
scrolls.desc: 3rd-level necromancy. 3d6 necrotic damage, heal half.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Banishment
scrolls.desc: 4th-level abjuration. Send creature to another plane.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Dimension Door
scrolls.desc: 4th-level conjuration. Teleport 500 ft.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Greater Invisibility
scrolls.desc: 4th-level illusion. Invisible even while attacking/casting.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Ice Storm
scrolls.desc: 4th-level evocation. 2d8 bludgeoning + 4d6 cold in 20-ft cylinder.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Polymorph
scrolls.desc: 4th-level transmutation. Transform creature into a beast.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Wall of Fire
scrolls.desc: 4th-level evocation. 60-ft wall deals 5d8 fire damage.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Cloudkill
scrolls.desc: 5th-level conjuration. 20-ft-radius poison cloud, 5d8 damage.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Cone of Cold
scrolls.desc: 5th-level evocation. 8d8 cold damage in 60-ft cone.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Hold Monster
scrolls.desc: 5th-level enchantment. Paralyze any creature. WIS save.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Telekinesis
scrolls.desc: 5th-level transmutation. Move objects/creatures with mind.

scrolls.name: Scroll of Wall of Force
scrolls.desc: 5th-level evocation. Invisible, indestructible wall.

magicTrinkets.name: Bag of Holding
magicTrinkets.desc: Interior holds up to 500 lbs / 64 cu ft. Weighs only 15 lbs. Retrieving an item is an action.

magicTrinkets.name: Boots of Elvenkind
magicTrinkets.desc: Your steps make no sound. Advantage on Stealth checks that rely on moving silently.

magicTrinkets.name: Boots of Speed
magicTrinkets.desc: As a Bonus Action, double walking speed for 10 minutes. Recharges at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Bracers of Archery
magicTrinkets.desc: Gain proficiency with longbow and shortbow. +2 damage with bows.

magicTrinkets.name: Bracers of Defense
magicTrinkets.desc: +2 AC if you wear no armor and use no shield.

magicTrinkets.name: Brooch of Shielding
magicTrinkets.desc: Resistance to Force damage. Immune to Magic Missile.

magicTrinkets.name: Cape of the Mountebank
magicTrinkets.desc: Cast Dimension Door once per day. Recharges at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Circlet of Blasting
magicTrinkets.desc: Cast Scorching Ray once per day. Recharges at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Cloak of Displacement
magicTrinkets.desc: Attacks against you have Disadvantage. Ends if you take damage (resets at start of your turn).

magicTrinkets.name: Cloak of Elvenkind
magicTrinkets.desc: Advantage on Stealth checks. Perception checks to see you have Disadvantage.

magicTrinkets.name: Cloak of Protection
magicTrinkets.desc: +1 to AC and saving throws.

magicTrinkets.name: Cloak of the Bat
magicTrinkets.desc: Advantage on Stealth in dim light/darkness. In darkness, fly 40 ft. Cast Polymorph (self into bat) 1/day.

magicTrinkets.name: Cloak of the Manta Ray
magicTrinkets.desc: Breathe underwater. Swimming speed of 60 ft.

magicTrinkets.name: Decanter of Endless Water
magicTrinkets.desc: Produce 1-30 gallons of water on command.

magicTrinkets.name: Gauntlets of Ogre Power
magicTrinkets.desc: Your Strength score becomes 19. No effect if STR is already 19 or higher.

magicTrinkets.name: Gloves of Missile Snaring
magicTrinkets.desc: Use Reaction to reduce ranged weapon damage by 1d10 + DEX. If reduced to 0, catch it.

magicTrinkets.name: Gloves of Swimming and Climbing
magicTrinkets.desc: Climbing and swimming don't cost extra movement. +5 to Athletics for climbing/swimming.

magicTrinkets.name: Gloves of Thievery
magicTrinkets.desc: Invisible while worn. +5 to Sleight of Hand and lockpicking.

magicTrinkets.name: Goggles of Night
magicTrinkets.desc: Darkvision 60 ft.

magicTrinkets.name: Hat of Disguise
magicTrinkets.desc: Cast Disguise Self at will.

magicTrinkets.name: Headband of Intellect
magicTrinkets.desc: Your Intelligence score becomes 19. No effect if INT is already 19 or higher.

magicTrinkets.name: Helm of Comprehending Languages
magicTrinkets.desc: Cast Comprehend Languages at will.

magicTrinkets.name: Helm of Telepathy
magicTrinkets.desc: Cast Detect Thoughts at will. Telepathic communication within 30 ft.

magicTrinkets.name: Immovable Rod
magicTrinkets.desc: Press button to fix rod in place. Holds up to 8,000 lbs. DC 30 STR to move.

magicTrinkets.name: Lantern of Revealing
magicTrinkets.desc: Bright light 30 ft reveals invisible creatures and objects.

magicTrinkets.name: Medallion of Thoughts
magicTrinkets.desc: 3 charges. Cast Detect Thoughts (1 charge). Regains 1d3 charges at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Necklace of Adaptation
magicTrinkets.desc: Breathe normally in any environment. Advantage on saves vs. harmful gases.

magicTrinkets.name: Periapt of Health
magicTrinkets.desc: Immune to disease.

magicTrinkets.name: Periapt of Proof Against Poison
magicTrinkets.desc: Immune to poison damage and Poisoned condition.

magicTrinkets.name: Periapt of Wound Closure
magicTrinkets.desc: Stabilize automatically at 0 HP. Double HP from Hit Dice.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Evasion
magicTrinkets.desc: 3 charges. When you fail a DEX save, use Reaction to succeed instead. Regains 1d3 at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Feather Falling
magicTrinkets.desc: Fall at 60 ft/round, take no falling damage.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Free Action
magicTrinkets.desc: Difficult terrain doesn't cost extra movement. Can't be paralyzed or restrained by magic.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Invisibility
magicTrinkets.desc: Turn invisible as an action. Ends when you attack or cast.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Jumping
magicTrinkets.desc: Cast Jump on yourself at will.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Mind Shielding
magicTrinkets.desc: Immune to magic that reads thoughts/determines lies. Telepathy blocked.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Protection
magicTrinkets.desc: +1 to AC and saving throws.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Resistance
magicTrinkets.desc: Resistance to one damage type (determined by gem).

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Spell Storing
magicTrinkets.desc: Store up to 5 levels of spells. Anyone can cast stored spells.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Swimming
magicTrinkets.desc: Swimming speed of 40 ft.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Warmth
magicTrinkets.desc: Resistance to Cold damage. Comfortable in temperatures as low as -50°F.

magicTrinkets.name: Ring of Water Walking
magicTrinkets.desc: Stand and walk on liquid surfaces as if solid ground.

magicTrinkets.name: Robe of Eyes
magicTrinkets.desc: See in all directions. Advantage on Perception. Darkvision 120 ft. See invisible.

magicTrinkets.name: Robe of Useful Items
magicTrinkets.desc: Patches can be detached to become real items (ladders, doors, etc.).

magicTrinkets.name: Rope of Climbing
magicTrinkets.desc: 60-ft rope. Command it to move, knot, tie off. AC 20, 20 HP.

magicTrinkets.name: Slippers of Spider Climbing
magicTrinkets.desc: Walk on walls and ceilings. Hands free.

magicTrinkets.name: Stone of Good Luck
magicTrinkets.desc: +1 to ability checks and saving throws.

magicTrinkets.name: Wand of Magic Detection
magicTrinkets.desc: 3 charges. Cast Detect Magic (1 charge). Regains 1d3 at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Wand of Magic Missiles
magicTrinkets.desc: 7 charges. Cast Magic Missile using 1-3 charges. Regains 1d6+1 at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Wand of Secrets
magicTrinkets.desc: 3 charges. Point to nearest secret door/trap within 30 ft. Regains 1d3 at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Wand of the War Mage +1
magicTrinkets.desc: +1 to spell attack rolls. Ignore half cover for spell attacks.

magicTrinkets.name: Wand of the War Mage +2
magicTrinkets.desc: +2 to spell attack rolls. Ignore half cover for spell attacks.

magicTrinkets.name: Wand of Web
magicTrinkets.desc: 7 charges. Cast Web (2 charges). Regains 1d6+1 at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Wings of Flying
magicTrinkets.desc: Flying speed of 60 ft for 1 hour. Recharges at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Amulet of Health
magicTrinkets.desc: Your Constitution score becomes 19. No effect if CON is already 19 or higher.

magicTrinkets.name: Amulet of Proof Against Detection
magicTrinkets.desc: Hidden from divination magic. Can't be targeted by divination or perceived through scrying.

magicTrinkets.name: Belt of Giant Strength (Hill)
magicTrinkets.desc: Your Strength score becomes 21.

magicTrinkets.name: Belt of Giant Strength (Stone)
magicTrinkets.desc: Your Strength score becomes 23.

magicTrinkets.name: Belt of Giant Strength (Frost)
magicTrinkets.desc: Your Strength score becomes 23.

magicTrinkets.name: Belt of Giant Strength (Fire)
magicTrinkets.desc: Your Strength score becomes 25.

magicTrinkets.name: Belt of Giant Strength (Cloud)
magicTrinkets.desc: Your Strength score becomes 27.

magicTrinkets.name: Belt of Giant Strength (Storm)
magicTrinkets.desc: Your Strength score becomes 29.

magicTrinkets.name: Belt of Dwarvenkind
magicTrinkets.desc: +2 CON (max 20). Advantage on CHA checks with dwarves. Darkvision 60 ft. Advantage vs poison.

magicTrinkets.name: Eyes of Charming
magicTrinkets.desc: 3 charges. Cast Charm Person (1 charge, DC 13). Regains 1d3 at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Eyes of Minute Seeing
magicTrinkets.desc: Advantage on Investigation checks within 1 ft.

magicTrinkets.name: Eyes of the Eagle
magicTrinkets.desc: Advantage on Perception checks that rely on sight.

magicTrinkets.name: Gem of Brightness
magicTrinkets.desc: 50 charges. Bright light, flare to blind, or sunlight beam.

magicTrinkets.name: Gem of Seeing
magicTrinkets.desc: 3 charges. See 120 ft Truesight for 10 min. Regains 1d3 at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Handy Haversack
magicTrinkets.desc: Three pouches holding 120 lbs total. Retrieve item as Bonus Action.

magicTrinkets.name: Horn of Blasting
magicTrinkets.desc: 5d6 thunder + deafened in 30-ft cone. 20% chance to explode.

magicTrinkets.name: Ioun Stone (Protection)
magicTrinkets.desc: +1 to AC.

magicTrinkets.name: Ioun Stone (Awareness)
magicTrinkets.desc: Can't be surprised.

magicTrinkets.name: Ioun Stone (Reserve)
magicTrinkets.desc: Store up to 3 spell levels for later casting.

magicTrinkets.name: Portable Hole
magicTrinkets.desc: 6-ft-diameter, 10-ft-deep extradimensional hole. Folds into cloth.

magicTrinkets.name: Sending Stones
magicTrinkets.desc: Pair of stones. Send 25-word message once per day.

magicTrinkets.name: Staff of Healing
magicTrinkets.desc: 10 charges. Cast Cure Wounds, Lesser Restoration, Mass Cure Wounds. Regains 1d6+4 at dawn.

magicTrinkets.name: Staff of the Python
magicTrinkets.desc: Throw to become Giant Constrictor Snake under your control.

magicTrinkets.name: Staff of the Woodlands
magicTrinkets.desc: +2 spell attacks. 10 charges. Cast various nature spells. Can become tree.

magicShopFramework.desc: Framework for magic item shops. Shops can be added to scenes via shop-data.json with type: 'magic'.

general.desc: Basic adventuring gear, weapons, armor, potions

guild.desc: Specialized items for guild members only
